mapper.sql: file_id, user_id, file_md5, file_pid, file_size, file_name, file_cover, file_path, create_time, last_update_time, folder_type, file_category, file_type, status
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_info WHERE file_pid = #{filePid} AND status = 1

SELECT
FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

WITH RECURSIVE file_tree AS ( SELECT
FROM file_info WHERE file_pid = #{filePid} AND status = 1 UNION ALL SELECT f. FROM file_info f INNER JOIN file_tree ft ON f.file_pid = ft.file_id WHERE f.status = 1 ) SELECT * FROM file_tree

SELECT
FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM file_info WHERE file_md5 = #{fileMd5} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND folder_type = 0

SELECT
FROM file_info WHERE file_path = #{filePath} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_info WHERE file_type = #{fileType} AND status = 1

SELECT
FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND folder_type = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
